title: Preventative Maintenance Technician
status: Full Time, 40 hours per week (year round, 239 day calendar)Minimum Requirements:High school diploma or general education degree (GED); or six months to one year related experience and/or training; or equivalent combination of education and experience.  Experience working with the necessary specialized tools.  Universal HVAC and/or ESCO certifications are preferred.  Must have and maintain an active Utah Driver's License.The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 2 of the MN Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkMN Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Preventive Maintenance Technician.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
